---
title: "Madalene Sabine Jenkyns"
---

## Madalene Sabine Jenkyns

**Dates:** (1848-1935)

**Maiden name:** (Pasley)

### Description

first editor of the <i>Mothers\' Union Journal</i>

### Biography

Daughter of Admiral Sir Thomas Sabine-Pasley, 2nd Bt., she married (1877) Henry Jenkyns, barrister, parliamentary counsel to the Treasury.  He was knighted in 1892 when she became Lady Jenkyns/.

### Letters

- Letter from November 23. [1888?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
